About

Multi-page coverage : a second Nunjucks template that the obfuscator must walk and transform alongside index.html.

Card 1

Distinct utility set from the home page so we can verify cross-page deduplication.

Card 2

Grid layout exercises responsive variants (sm:grid-cols-2).
